name: Dale Earnhardt
title: Dale Earnhardt - taken 2/18/01 died later that day 2/18/01, 49
description: Dale Earnhardt - taken 2/18/01 died later that day 2/18/01, 49
bio: Dale Earnhardt was an American professional stock car racing driver known as "The Intimidator". He won seven NASCAR Winston Cup championships, tying Richard Petty's record.
